string 2: Bored! I'm sooo bored!
{next}You look really bored.
{next}Why are you so bored?
{next}Wanna hear a funny joke?

That's right. I'm bored. I came here to get rid of that
boredom by fighting, but no luck.

Because nothing is going my way. I wish at least my own
apprentice would do as I say.

A joke? ...Nah, forget it. I've never heard a "funny joke"
that was actually funny.

I'm a member of the Royal Knights, a strong and proud
knight.

I'm tempted to throw a fit about that apprentice of mine but
I was told to refrain.

So here I am, quietly waiting for my apprentice, but he
still hasn't shown up.
{next}I met King Drasil, by the way.
{next}Apprentice?
{next}Maybe he ran away.
Oh, you met King Drasil? I hope they're doing well.
Yeah, Jesmon, an apprentice I raised up with great care.

Impossible! Jesmon may be late a lot, but he's competitive
and hates to lose, so no.
If ya find Jesmon, could ya let him know that I'm waiting?

He went out to try the ramen of this world and never came
back. I'm counting on ya!

I am sorry to keep you waiting, Master! This world's
Yaro-kei ramen was truly amazing!
It's about time! ...So, ya found Jesmon for me, did ya?

And, thanks to you, we now know where to meet the others. I
should thank ya in some way.
{next}Yes, please.
{next}What are you giving me?
{next}Are you giving me candy?

Hm. I'll give ya the best thing I have to offer. This old
man's iron fist!
This old man's iron fist, of course!

Sorry. I don't have that kind of stuff. But I'll give ya
this old man's iron fist!

That is a great idea! It is an honor to be able to train
with my master, you know.

Seems ya weren't expecting this. How about if ya beat me,
I'll give ya something else?

I'll be waiting at the arena. ...Jesmon! You fight alongside, 
too. Let's see if ya got rusty.

I have been looking forward to training with my master
again! Good luck to both of us!
Let's do this!
It is almost time!

You were amazing! As promised, here's yer reward. It's yers
to keep.

It was actually pretty fun. Fighting with humans isn't half
bad.

Master, I think we had better head for the rendezvous
point now.

Calm down, now. Truth is... I could've gone there any time
if I wanted...

But someone told me to refrain from acting as a Royal Knight
and to keep quiet. Guess who?
{next}I have no idea.
{next}King Drasil?
{next}Omnimon?
Haha. I bet ya don't. It was Alphamon.

Now, why would King Drasil tell me to refrain from acting as
a Royal Knight?
It's Alphamon who told me to keep quiet.
No way! Why would I obey Omnimon's orders?!
It's Alphamon who told me to keep quiet.

I thought Alphamon was a vacant member of the Royal Knights.
Why would it say such a thing?

I'm sure there's a reason. I dunno what, but something may
have happened in this world.

It was blathering on, asking what the point of the foolish
human race surviving was...
{next}I'm sure there's a point.
{next}We're not in a position to decide.
{next}Maybe there is no point.

As somebody from the human side, of course you would say
that.

That's right. It's not up to you or me to decide. But that
goes for Alphamon, too.
Haha. Another human I know well said the same thing.

We tend to be dualistic, just wanting to distinguish between 
zero and one.

With that in mind, I was pondering whether I should listen
to Alphamon or King Drasil.

I want you and Jesmon to accompany me while I make my final
decision.
{next}Sure.
{next}What do you plan on doing?
{next}That's a lot of pressure.

Alright, you'll be a witness to my final decision. I'll send
ya the coordinates later.

It'd take too long to explain. The quickest way is to just
let ya see in person.

Ya sure don't look like you're under pressure. Humans are
interesting things.

I'm going ahead, then. Check that Digiline thing for the
location. See ya.

This is becoming a big deal. The very survival of the human 
race is at stake.

I am sorry, but could you stay with us a bit longer?
I shall go when I am ready, too.
Where did Jesmon go? I'm counting on ya!
